message:
Tests: update connector tests for improved parsing behavior

**connector_claude.rs**
- Rewrite test to use isolated tempdir environment with realistic fixture
- Copy fixture to temp path containing "claude" to satisfy detector heuristics
- Update assertions for real-world JSONL structure:
  - Verify non-empty title extraction (content-derived)
  - Verify assistant role and content matching
  - Add assertions for new sessionId and gitBranch metadata extraction
- Use tests/fixtures/claude_code_real/ fixture which reflects actual
  Claude Code JSONL format

**connector_cline.rs**
- Update expected message count: 2 instead of 3
  - Connector now prefers ui_messages.json (2 msgs) over merging with
    api_conversation_history.json (which had 1 additional msg)
  - This avoids duplicate/redundant content from API history
- Update content assertion to match ui_messages content ("Hello Cline")
- Add comment explaining the preference rationale

These test updates reflect the connector improvements made to:
- Extract richer metadata from Claude Code sessions
- Prefer user-facing UI messages over API history in Cline

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
